JSON: {"displayName":"CIPP: Managed Windows 10 Devices","description":"Company-owned Windows devices with version numbers below 10.0.22000.*","platform":"windows10AndLater","rule":"(device.operatingSystemVersion -lt 10.0.22000.00) and \n(device.deviceOwnership -eq \"Company\")","assignmentFilterManagementType":"devices","GUID":"ab8ef343-c1c1-492f-b2c2-45a28377afb2"}
